acceptance: Physical iOS and Android runs cover camera, import, latency, battery, thermal, and airplane-mode workflows.
The native QA evidence validator passes with real measured values.
issues.body:
## Release Blocker
Capture physical iOS and Android evidence for camera, import, latency, battery, thermal, and airplane mode.

Owner: `qa`
Tracks: `internal`, `store`
Status: `blocked`

## Acceptance
- [ ] Physical iOS and Android runs cover camera, import, latency, battery, thermal, and airplane-mode workflows.
- [ ] The native QA evidence validator passes with real measured values.

## Required Proof
- docs/sdlc/native-qa-evidence.json

## Commands
- `npm run native:qa:runbook`
- `npm run native:qa:validate`

## Environment Key Names
- None

## Secret Policy
No secret values or raw local artifacts should be committed as proof.

Do not attach credential values, private keys, raw video, absolute local paths, or raw local artifacts to this issue.
issues.secretPolicy: No secret values or raw local artifacts should be committed as proof.
issues.title: [Release Blocker] Native device QA evidence

acceptance: Full Xcode is installed on the release machine.
An iOS simulator or physical-device build reaches the app shell with local analysis available.
issues.body:
## Release Blocker
Install full Xcode and verify an iOS simulator or device build.

Owner: `engineering`
Tracks: `store`
Status: `blocked`

## Acceptance
- [ ] Full Xcode is installed on the release machine.
- [ ] An iOS simulator or physical-device build reaches the app shell with local analysis available.

## Required Proof
- iOS simulator or device build log

## Commands
- `npx expo run:ios --device`
- `xcodebuild -workspace ios/MoveBeta.xcworkspace -scheme MoveBeta -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator`

## Environment Key Names
- None

## Secret Policy
No secret values or raw local artifacts should be committed as proof.

Do not attach credential values, private keys, raw video, absolute local paths, or raw local artifacts to this issue.
proof: iOS simulator or device build log
issues.secretPolicy: No secret values or raw local artifacts should be committed as proof.

The dataset validator passes without template placeholders or local raw-video references.
issues.body:
## Release Blocker
Run the versioned cue-validation dataset gate on real consented coach review data.

Owner: `product`
Tracks: `store`
Status: `blocked`

## Acceptance
- [ ] The cue-validation dataset uses consented climbing clips and real coach review rows.
- [ ] The dataset validator passes without template placeholders or local raw-video references.

## Required Proof

## Commands
- `npm run validation:cue`

## Environment Key Names
- None

## Secret Policy

Do not attach credential values, private keys, raw video, absolute local paths, or raw local artifacts to this issue.

acceptance: The app is initialized in the target Expo account.
The generated EAS project id is present in app configuration before strict release checks run.
issues.body:
## Release Blocker
Initialize the app on the target Expo account and store the generated project id in config.

Owner: `release`
Tracks: `store`
Status: `blocked`

## Acceptance
- [ ] The app is initialized in the target Expo account.
- [ ] The generated EAS project id is present in app configuration before strict release checks run.

## Required Proof
- app.json extra.eas.projectId

## Commands
- `npx eas-cli@latest init`

## Environment Key Names
- None

## Secret Policy
No secret values or raw local artifacts should be committed as proof.

Do not attach credential values, private keys, raw video, absolute local paths, or raw local artifacts to this issue.

acceptance: Expo, App Store Connect, and Google Play credentials are available only in shell, CI, or EAS secret storage.
Strict EAS release validation passes without committing secret values.
issues.body:
## Release Blocker
Provide Expo, App Store Connect, and Google Play credentials outside the repository.

Owner: `release`
Tracks: `store`
Status: `blocked`

## Acceptance
- [ ] Expo, App Store Connect, and Google Play credentials are available only in shell, CI, or EAS secret storage.
- [ ] Strict EAS release validation passes without committing secret values.

## Required Proof
- CI/EAS secret configuration
- Strict EAS validation output

## Commands
- `npm run release:eas:strict`

## Environment Key Names
- `EXPO_TOKEN`
- `MOVEBETA_ASC_APP_ID`
- `MOVEBETA_APPLE_ID or ASC_API_KEY_ID + ASC_API_ISSUER_ID + ASC_API_KEY_P8_BASE64`
- `GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON or GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY_PATH or MOVEBETA_GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON_BASE64`

## Secret Policy
Store credential values outside the repository; this checklist may list key names only.

Do not attach credential values, private keys, raw video, absolute local paths, or raw local artifacts to this issue.
issues.secretPolicy: Store credential values outside the repository; this checklist may list key names only.
issues.title: [Release Blocker] Store submission credentials
